reasoning: This is a data-heavy enterprise administration tool. It requires authority, clarity, and function-first design. The UI must get out of the way to allow users to focus on data validation. High contrast ensures readability during long review sessions.

headings.rules: Use for primary page headers and panel titles. High weight contrast (e.g., Bold for active, Regular for inactive).

body.rules: Use for all data table rows, labels, and standard text. Highly legible for dense layouts.

mono.rules: Use specifically for raw extracted data points, IDs, prices, and rates to ensure perfect vertical alignment.

colors.rules: 95% of the UI must be monochrome. Color exists strictly to guide action. Approve = Green, Delete/Issue = Red, Primary CTA/Focus = Klein Blue. Tint neutral greys with cool blue (Slate scale in Tailwind).

layout_and_spacing.rules: High density, clear hierarchy. Use sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm max 4px). Utilize visible grid borders ('The Technical Look') for panels and resizable split views. Every pixel must be utilized effectively.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use tight gaps (gap-2 to gap-4) in the data table for density. Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) around the main application shell to prevent claustrophobia.

panels.style: Technical Grid Borders. Use 'border-collapse' style layouts. Panels separated by 1px solid borders (border-slate-200).
panels.split_view: Use react-resizable-panels. Drag handle must be visually distinct but minimal (1px width, expanding to 4px on hover, colored Klein Blue on active drag).

buttons.primary: Square or 2px radius. Background Klein Blue (bg-[#002FA7]), Text White. Solid, no gradient.
buttons.secondary: Outline only. 1px solid border. Background transparent, Text Primary.
buttons.icon: Use clear, unambiguous icons. Phosphor icons preferred.
buttons.action_row: Small, dense icon buttons for inline table actions (Approve, Edit, Delete).

table.style: Dense tabular layout. 'border-b border-border/40'. No alternating row colors, instead use a very subtle hover effect (hover:bg-slate-50).
table.cells: Padding py-2 px-3 for high density. Editable cells should visually indicate editability via a subtle dashed bottom border or a hover pencil icon.

inputs.style: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, sharp corners. Focus state MUST be high contrast: 'focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/50 focus:border-[#002FA7]'.

modals.style: Solid background, crisp 1px borders, sharp drop shadows (Neo-brutalist influence), absolutely no glassmorphism.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight. Used strictly for utility actions (Approve, Edit, Delete, Warning, Zoom In/Out).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Background shifts subtly, borders darken.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: High contrast focus rings are MANDATORY for accessibility. Never rely on color alone.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast (150ms), ease-out. No bouncy or slow animations. Strictly functional UI.

screens.S1_Review_Landing: Grid of sharp-edged cards displaying the 5 PDFs. Progress bars (monochrome with Klein blue fill) showing review status (Rows reviewed vs total).
screens.S2_Review_Workspace: Main split view. Left: PDF Viewer wrapper with robust zoom controls overlaid at top or bottom. Right: Data Table. Sticky header with 'Complete & Export' CTA.
screens.S3_Row_Detail_Edit: Inline table editing for quick fixes, or a slide-out panel (Sheet component) for deeper row review and issue flagging.
screens.S4_Add_Missing_Row: Modal Dialog triggered from a sticky 'Add Row' button attached to the bottom of the table view.
screens.S5_Page_Navigation: Sticky footer/header in the PDF panel with intuitive Next/Prev page arrows and direct page number input.
screens.S6_Review_Progress: Mini dashboard metrics in the main header or a collapsible right sidebar showing session stats.
screens.S7_Menu_Notes_Review: A dedicated 'Notes' tab inside the data panel to review GST/tax/service charge notes detected by AI.
screens.S8_Export_Completion: Prominent CTA that validates if all rows are processed before allowing JSON export.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global CSS imports Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono.
Customize Tailwind config to include the specified fonts and accent colors.
Implement the Layout using raw HTML/Tailwind for the split-view structure, utilizing react-resizable-panels.
For the data table, build a custom dense table instead of relying completely on a bloated third-party grid, but use Shadcn primitives for Dropdowns, Dialogs, and Selects.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Strictly enforce typography rules.
Remove border-radius classes across components to maintain the Swiss Brutalist / High-Contrast aesthetic (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
